_comment: EVAL ORACLE — reviewed adult PK + mechanism per drug. Read ONLY by the test harness / dev /pk endpoint to score the live agent. The production agent (/calculate, retrieval.py) NEVER reads this — it must retrieve live or abstain.

flags: Cleanest CYP3A4 archetype; high oral first-pass (F~0.4).
midazolam.safety_note: Titrated sedative — toxic/effective bounds are SOFT and context-dependent (respiratory depression is the practical ceiling). Seeds only.
midazolam.source: Seed values — verify against label/PubMed in live path.

flags: AUC/MIC-driven + narrow therapeutic index — recommend TDM, do NOT stand alone.
vancomycin.safety_note: AUC24/MIC 400–600 target; bounds approximate — TDM governs, not these seeds.
vancomycin.source: Seed values — verify against label/PubMed in live path.

morphine.active_metabolite: Morphine-6-glucuronide (M6G) — ACTIVE, renally cleared; accumulates in renal impairment / neonates.
flags: Active renally-cleared metabolite (M6G) must be flagged — parent-clearance match understates effect when renal function is immature/impaired.
morphine.safety_note: Titrated opioid — bounds SOFT (respiratory depression is the practical ceiling; M6G accumulation lowers it further in renal immaturity). Seeds only.
morphine.source: Seed values — verify against label/PubMed in live path.

flags: Cmax/MIC-driven aminoglycoside — the PEAK sets efficacy, the TROUGH sets toxicity. Dose is size-matched (Vd), but the INTERVAL must be extended when clearance is immature — recommend extended-interval dosing + TDM (peak & trough).
Nephro-/ototoxic with narrow TI — do NOT stand alone; confirm with TDM.
gentamicin.safety_note: Aminoglycoside — toxicity is TROUGH-driven, efficacy is PEAK-driven; these daily-dose bounds are approximate and TDM governs. Seeds only.
gentamicin.source: Seed values — verify against label/PubMed in live path.

flags: Cmax/MIC-driven aminoglycoside (same archetype as gentamicin) — extended interval + TDM in the young; peak drives kill, trough drives toxicity.
Narrow TI, nephro-/ototoxic — TDM-dependent, does not stand alone.
amikacin.safety_note: Aminoglycoside — trough-driven toxicity, peak-driven efficacy; daily-dose bounds approximate, TDM governs. Seeds only.
amikacin.source: Seed values — verify against label/PubMed in live path.

flags: Extremely potent — dosed in micrograms; a size/clearance-scaled number must be sanity-checked against mcg/kg/h infusion practice.
CYP3A4 substrate — clearance (and this estimate) shifts with CYP3A4 inhibitors/inducers; context-sensitive half-time lengthens with infusion duration.
fentanyl.safety_note: Extremely potent, titrated — bounds SOFT (respiratory depression / chest-wall rigidity are the practical ceilings). Sanity-check against mcg/kg/h. Seeds only.
fentanyl.source: Seed values — verify against label/PubMed in live path.

flags: TIME>MIC-driven β-lactam — efficacy depends on the FRACTION of the interval above MIC, not on total exposure. The total-daily-dose match is only a proxy: frequent dosing or extended/continuous infusion is what actually hits the target.
ampicillin.safety_note: Very wide therapeutic index β-lactam — toxicity (CNS/seizure) only at extreme doses; the fT>MIC target, not these bounds, governs efficacy. Seeds only.
ampicillin.source: Seed values — verify against label/PubMed in live path.

flags: Hepatic CYP3A4 clearance — shares the midazolam maturation curve; clearance in the young is CYP3A4-limited, not size-limited.
C. difficile colitis risk — an antimicrobial-stewardship consideration, not a PK one.
clindamycin.safety_note: Wide TI; bounds approximate — GI/C. difficile risk is the practical limiter, not a PK toxic threshold. Seeds only.
clindamycin.source: Seed values — verify against label/PubMed in live path.
